description: NillableDuration is a wrapper around time.Duration which supports correct marshaling to YAML and JSON. It uses the value "Never" to signify that the duration is disabled and sets the inner duration as nil

Raw.description: Raw is used to ensure we remarshal the NillableDuration in the same format it was specified. This ensures tools like Flux and ArgoCD don't mistakenly detect drift due to our conversion webhooks.
